reviews.comment:
Los baños limpios, buena atención pero si vas de dia cuidado con dejar las puertas fel auto abiertas porque se llena de moscas.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are clean, the service is good, but if you go during the day be careful not to leave the car doors open because it gets full of flies.

reviews.comment:
Muy sucio el lugar para desayunar. Lleno de moscas y bichos muertos en el piso. Olor a raid. Nos fuimos a otra a desayunar

(Translated by Google)
The breakfast place was very dirty. Full of flies and dead bugs on the floor. It smelled like a raid. We went to another place for breakfast.

reviews.comment:
Atencion acorde al lugar en  donde está emplazada apaticos y correctos... servicio limpio y ordenado buenos baños considerando la alta concurrencia

(Translated by Google)
The service was appropriate for the location; the staff were apathetic but polite. The service was clean and tidy, and the restrooms were good considering the high volume of customers.
